itinerary.mapNote: Arrive by ferry to the abandoned fishing village. Arctic fox immediately visible. 50m.
Cross to Hornvík bay. Pass Hornbjarg cliffs with the seabird colonies. 200m.
The dramatic high crossing. Views to Greenland on clear days. 300m.
Descend into abandoned farm fjord. Pure solitude. 100m.
Final fjord crossing. Ferry returns to Isafjordur. 50m.

waypoints.name: Hornbjarg Cliffs
waypoints.note: Iceland's most dramatic bird cliffs. Half a million seabirds nest here.

waypoints.name: Hesteyri
waypoints.note: Abandoned doctor's house. Last inhabited 1952. Arctic fox colony now.

waypoints.name: Kálfatindar
waypoints.note: Highest point of the traverse. Greenland visible in clear conditions.

waypoints.name: Hornvík
waypoints.note: Most dramatic beach in Iceland. Backed by 500m cliffs.
